outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Day 10: Iran Death Toll Passes 1,332 as Mojtaba Khamenei Vows War Will Continue; 8 US Service Members Now Dead
outlets.summary: Focuses on the mounting humanitarian catastrophe in Iran and the growing US death toll. Questions whether the new Supreme Leader's vow of continued war dooms diplomatic efforts.

outlets.name: MSNBC
outlets.headline: Trump Demands Unconditional Surrender as Swiss Condemn Campaign; Democrats Warn of 'Forever War'
outlets.summary: Emphasizes international condemnation from neutral nations and growing domestic opposition. Frames Trump's surrender demand as unrealistic escalation with no exit strategy.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei's Rise Signals Regime Consolidation, Not Collapse — US Strategy in Question
outlets.summary: Analysis argues the hereditary succession undermines the US theory that strikes would fracture Iran's leadership. Reports intelligence community divided on war's trajectory.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump Stands Firm: 'Unconditional Surrender or Total Destruction' — Oil Prices Spike but Iran Crumbling
outlets.summary: Frames Trump's ultimatum as decisive leadership. Downplays oil price surge as temporary cost of victory. Highlights Saudi civilian deaths as proof Iran is the aggressor.

outlets.name: New York Post
outlets.headline: Iran's New 'Supreme Leader' Is Khamenei's Son — Regime Goes Full Dynasty as Walls Close In
outlets.summary: Mocks the hereditary succession as desperation. Portrays Mojtaba Khamenei as an unqualified figurehead propped up by a dying regime.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: Hezbollah Attacks NATO Base in Cyprus — Macron Talks Tough but Europe Still Won't Fight
outlets.summary: Uses the Akrotiri attack to argue Europe has been freeloading on US security. Criticizes European nations for condemning Iran but refusing to join military operations.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Day 10: Oil Hits $119 as Hormuz Closes; Hezbollah Strikes Cyprus; New Supreme Leader Named in Tehran
outlets.summary: Comprehensive overview of a war now touching NATO territory. Tracks the cascading economic crisis as oil smashes past $100 and the Strait of Hormuz is effectively shut.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran's Dead Surpass 1,332 as Saudi Civilians Killed for First Time; Switzerland Condemns US-Israel Campaign
outlets.summary: Leads with the civilian death toll across the region. Highlights Swiss condemnation as a turning point in international opinion against the US-Israel military campaign.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Brent Crude Hits $119.50 Intraday — 310 Vessels Stranded as Hormuz Blockade Becomes Total
outlets.summary: Focuses on the economic dimensions. Reports 310+ vessels at anchor, US gas at $3.48/gal (AAA) and rising, and global supply chains under severe strain as the strait is effectively closed.

outlets.name: France 24
outlets.headline: Macron: 'Attack on Cyprus Is Attack on Europe' — Hezbollah Drone Strike on RAF Akrotiri Shakes NATO
outlets.summary: Leads with the Akrotiri strike and Macron's declaration. Reports emergency NATO consultations and debates on whether Article 5 applies to the Cyprus attack.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF Intensifies Campaign as Mojtaba Khamenei Takes Power; Defense Officials Say War 'Far From Over'
outlets.summary: Reports on expanded Israeli strike operations following the new Supreme Leader's vow to continue fighting. Military analysts warn the succession means no near-term ceasefire.

outlets.name: Ynet News
outlets.headline: 8 US Troops Dead, Hormuz Shut, Oil at $119 — War's Cost Mounts as Khamenei Dynasty Digs In
outlets.summary: Covers the widening toll of the conflict on coalition forces and the global economy. Reports on Israeli home front fatigue as the war enters its second week.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei's Succession Dashes Hopes of Quick Resolution; Mossad Assesses Regime Hardening
outlets.summary: Intelligence analysis piece arguing the hereditary succession consolidates hardline control and eliminates moderate factions that might have sought a ceasefire.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei Pledges Sacred Defense Will Continue Until Final Victory
outlets.summary: Celebrates the succession as proof of regime unity and strength. Frames Mojtaba Khamenei's appointment as divinely ordained continuation of the resistance.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Saudi Civilians Pay Price of Alliance with Aggressors; Switzerland Exposes US-Israel War Crimes
outlets.summary: Uses the Al-Kharj strike to warn Gulf states against siding with the US-Israel coalition. Amplifies Swiss condemnation as vindication of Iran's legal position.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Resistance Forces Strike Enemy Base in Cyprus; Hormuz Blockade Cripples Zionist-American War Machine
outlets.summary: Frames the Akrotiri attack and Hormuz closure as strategic victories. Claims the economic warfare is breaking the enemy's will to fight.
